description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rectangular top and a slightly tapered body, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The front features five horizontal open slots, suggesting shelving or open compartments, with the rest of the structure made from a medium-brown wood. The sides and back are solid wood panels with no visible openings or hardware, giving the piece a clean, minimalist appearance. The cabinet stands on four small feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding a natural texture to the surface. There are no visible handles, glass panels, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional and utilitarian design.
description: A tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with five open front slots and a minimalist, tapered design. The medium-brown wood finish and visible grain give it a natural, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: The front view shows five open horizontal slots framed by wood, revealing the shelving structure inside.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid wood panel with no openings or features, highlighting the cabinet's tapering shape.
description_view_2: The back view is a plain, uninterrupted wooden panel, showing no access points or features.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a solid wood panel and the same tapered profile.
